name: Downtown Revitalization District
description: Multi-phase downtown development plan including Commerce Street corridor improvements, new mixed-use buildings, and expansion of the Riverwalk district. Investment exceeds $150M.

name: East Montgomery Growth Corridor
description: New residential and commercial development along Eastern Blvd and Taylor Road area. Includes planned retail centers, housing developments, and infrastructure upgrades.

name: Opportunity Zones
description: Federal Opportunity Zones in Montgomery provide tax incentives for investment in designated census tracts. Current zones include downtown, west Montgomery, and areas near Alabama State University.

name: Business License Statistics
description: Montgomery issues approximately 8,500 active business licenses. Top categories: Retail (22%), Food Service (15%), Professional Services (18%), Construction (12%), Healthcare (8%).

name: Zoning Map Updates 2025
description: Updated zoning ordinances include new mixed-use overlay districts, streamlined permitting for small businesses, and enhanced environmental protections near waterways.

name: Affordable Housing Initiative
description: City program to build 1,200 new affordable housing units across Montgomery by 2028. Partnerships with Habitat for Humanity and local developers. Focuses on west and north Montgomery neighborhoods.
